scripts.kill:gateway: lsof -ti :17871 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Gateway not running'
scripts.kill:api: lsof -ti :8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'API not running'
scripts.kill:dashboard: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Dashboard not running'
scripts.kill:website: lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Website not running'
scripts.kill:docs: lsof -ti :3002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docs not running'
scripts.kill:all: bun run kill:gateway && bun run kill:api && bun run kill:dashboard && bun run kill:website && bun run kill:docs && bun run clean:locks && echo 'All clear.'
